title: C2: archive Skill Phase 0.5 viability gate + Phase 1.5 scope decision + edit_paths generation
description: Update archive Skill SKILL.md. Insert Phase 0.5 viability gate before Phase 1: scan user_messages_summary + recent_paths against archive-signal list (≥1 of: 'always/never' / '记一下' / '下次注意' / wrong-turn-and-revert / >15min diagnostic / new dependency-or-pattern / decision confirmation / explicit dismissal-with-reason). If none hit → Stop with message '本次会话为常规执行，无新知识可归档'. Anti-archive signals (typo-only / pure-refactor / narrow-rename-request / duplicate-of-existing). User-explicit invocation bypasses gate. Insert Phase 1.5 subjective scope decision: rule block telling Agent how to choose narrow vs broad (default broad, narrow requires explicit single-module evidence). Inline-edit [scope=...] during Phase 1 review supported. Add edit_paths single-signal relevance_paths generation: scan transcript for tool_use.name ∈ {Edit, Write, MultiEdit}, dedupe paths, public-prefix generalize depth ≤ 2 minGroupSize=2, glob blacklist (**/*.<ext>, repo-root single files like README.md/package.json). Read-only paths go to ## Evidence block, never relevance_paths. Anchor: handoff.json#code_anchors fabric-archive/SKILL.md current Phase 0/1/2.

files.change: Insert Phase 0.5 viability gate + Phase 1.5 scope decision; update Phase 1 candidate format to include [scope=narrow|broad] tag; document edit_paths algorithm

implementation: Read current SKILL.md to understand Phase 0/1/2 structure
Draft Phase 0.5 viability gate section: list 8 archive-signals + 4 anti-archive signals; explicit-invocation bypass clause; stop message
Draft Phase 1.5 scope decision: narrow-vs-broad rule block with examples; default broad; narrow requires single-module evidence; user inline-edit [scope=...] supported
Update Phase 1 candidate format: show [scope=narrow|broad] + relevance_paths inline in candidate display

Document edit_paths algorithm in SKILL.md (subsection of Phase 1.5):
  1. Scan transcript for tool_use.name ∈ {Edit, Write, MultiEdit}
  2. Dedupe paths
  3. Public-prefix generalize: find common prefixes, generalize to glob with depth ≤ 2, minGroupSize=2
  4. Apply blacklist: **/*.<ext>, repo-root single files (README.md, package.json)
  5. Read-only paths → ## Evidence markdown block (not relevance_paths)
Pin examples in SKILL.md showing correct generalization (e.g., packages/server/src/services/{a.ts,b.ts} → packages/server/src/services/**/*.ts with minGroupSize=2)
Smoke test: dry-run skill on this repo's recent session; verify viability gate correctness

criteria: fabric-archive Skill SKILL.md contains Phase 0.5 viability gate with archive-signal + anti-archive-signal lists
fabric-archive Skill SKILL.md contains Phase 1.5 scope decision rules; default broad
fabric-archive Skill generates relevance_paths from edit_paths only (no read_paths, no body regex)
fabric-archive Skill applies public-prefix generalization with depth ≤ 2 and minGroupSize=2
fabric-archive Skill applies glob blacklist: **/*.<ext>, repo-root single files

rationale.chosen_approach: Direct SKILL.md template edit; logic lives in Agent prompting, not server code
decision_factors: Skill is Agent-driven prompt logic per Fabric design
Viability decision is inherently subjective + transcript-aware
rationale.tradeoffs: Gate quality depends on Agent's judgment; mitigated by explicit signal lists and anti-signals

manual_checks: Trigger fabric-archive on a session with typo-only edits → verify gate stops with explanation
Trigger on session with new dependency adoption → verify gate passes
Trigger on session with edits to single module → verify Phase 1.5 produces narrow scope
success_metrics: Gate correctly stops on 4/4 anti-archive cases
Gate correctly passes on 8/8 archive cases

risks.mitigation: Depth ≤ 2 + minGroupSize=2 constrains scope; document expected outputs in SKILL.md examples
risks.fallback: User can inline-edit relevance_paths during Phase 1 review
